overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a western-themed open world game showing a cowboy character exploring a rocky desert canyon shoreline and swimming in a calm river under a bright clear sky.

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky riverbank surveying the canyon landscape ahead

entered.detail: tall rocky canyon wall with layered sedimentary formations
distant rocky cliff face on the opposite side of the river
calm greenish river water reflecting the sky and canyon walls
uneven rocky and sandy shoreline where the character stands
large mesa-like rock formation visible across the river

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rocky desert canyon shoreline with steep canyon walls rising on both sides. The calm river stretches ahead under a clear blue sky, with distant rock formations visible across the water.

events.description: character steps from rocky shore into the river and begins swimming forward

agents.ego_description: wading into the river and swimming through the calm water toward the canyon wall ahead

segments.scene_description: The character enters the calm river water and begins swimming forward, leaving the rocky shoreline behind on the left. The camera follows from behind as the character moves deeper into the water toward the approaching canyon wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a trek along a rugged canyon shoreline to a swim through a calm river. It begins with the character walking beside the water, flanked by steep canyon walls that rise sharply under a clear blue sky. As the character moves forward, the rocky terrain on the left recedes while the river stretches ahead toward distant rock formations. The scene then shifts as the character enters the water, with the camera following from behind as they swim deeper into the current. The movement finally carries the character away from the shore and directly toward the looming presence of the approaching canyon wall.
